text:
Headnotes†
Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1985 – 
s.18 – Bail – High Court granted bail to the accused in a 
case registered for offence punishable u/s.18 – Subsequently, 
accused involved in another case under NDPS Act and also 
arrested for the same, and trial had already commenced: 
Held: Having regard to the nature of the offence as also the fact 
that the accused has been arrested in a similar offence under the 
NDPS Act, it is appropriate to set aside the impugned order passed 
by the High Court – Impugned order set aside – Accused to be 
taken into custody and trial court to expedite the trial. [Paras 5, 6]
